name: Breakfast Burritos (Serves 12)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound pork sausage, browned and drained
3 cups Cheddar cheese, about 12 oz, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, fry hash browns according to package directions; remove and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat eggs; add onions and green pepper. Pour into the same skillet; cook and stir until eggs are set.
3. Remove from heat. Add hash browns and sausage; mix gently.
4. Place about 3/4 cup filling on each tortilla and top with about 1/4 cup cheese.
5. Roll up and place on a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 15 to 20 minutes, or until heated through.
7. Serve with salsa if desired.
